title: 日本ダービーの後に・広まりゆく露水

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I really did it. ☆ I managed to do it perfectly, and in front of this many people too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: A feng shui dash that no one could imitate!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so that's Copano Rickey, huh? She uses
feng shui to help her run...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Watching her gives you goosebumps, doesn't it?
It feels like she might pull off something amazing!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I never really noticed her before, but she's
sparked my interest now. Maybe I should check
out her next race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! ☆ With this, I've managed to
connect the flow of popularity from the Japanese
Derby to the dirt track!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And there's one more thing to be thankful for!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I'd never met you, Trainer, I probably would
never have been able to enter the Japanese
Derby.
choice_data_list: You mean, based on your achievements?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, based on feng shui. This is something I
haven't spoken about yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Quite a while back, I checked my compatibility
with the Japanese Derby, and it was pretty low.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Leading up to the race, I knew there was a chance
something would happen to keep me from
entering. Like being blocked by fate or
something, you know?
choice_data_list: But you managed to overcome it?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I felt a slight energy disturbance, and that
seemed to have brought about a change.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ♪ It was you who brought it within my
capacity to do something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't really understand everything
Copano Rickey is talking about, but it seems
certain that I contributed to her success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, look Trainer! That store over there!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! The feng shui shop is packed with people!
I've never seen it this crowded before!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, check out these stones. Aren't they so
pretty? Apparently, it's best to get them in your
lucky color.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking about buying a book. I wanna know
the best things to place near my pillow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shop is bustling with crowds of customers.
There's even a large banner outside.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The banner says... let's see—Popularized by Copano Rickey! The Miraculous Power of Feng Shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I'm glad that it's becoming popular, but
branding it as miraculous seems a bit over the
top.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I prefer a more grounded approach
showing people how practicing feng shui leads to
improving one's own luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The presentation may be hyperbolic, but it's
better than having no one interested at all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This must be the result of my running in the
Japanese Derby. I knew it would garner a whole
different level of attention! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I hope now even more people will start getting
interested in feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, check out this letter! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It says, "Trying out your feng shui has made me a
little more positive-minded! Now, I'm a huge
fan! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I can really feel it—feng shui is gradually
helping spread happiness to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, this is perfect! As we enter the ninth
solar term, summer welcomes us with a bountiful
harvest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I hope my feng shui spreads far and wide! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a hugely popular event, the Japanese
Derby has helped capture the interest of many
people. It looks like Copano Rickey's strategy has
paid off.
